ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry category of the publisher */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience demographic */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location where the campaign will run */,
  "advertising_channels" TEXT /* Advertising channels used (e.g., social media, email) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisements" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign to which the ad belongs */,
  "publisher_id" TEXT /* ID of the publisher where the ad is displayed */,
  "ad_content" TEXT /* Content of the advertisement */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of advertisement (e.g., banner, video) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the advertisement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the advertisement */,
  "landing_page_url" TEXT /* Landing page URL for the advertisement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of engagement in seconds */,
  "visits" INTEGER /* Number of visits generated by the ad */,
  "score" REAL /* Score based on user interaction */,
  "percent" INTEGER /* Percentage of goal achieved */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned based on advertising strategy */,
  "reconcile_stamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp for reconciliation of metrics */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Percentage of users who bounced off the page */,
  "average_position" REAL /* Average position of the ad on the page */,
  "impression_share" REAL /* Percentage of impressions served compared to total impressions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES advertisements ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Job function of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, view campaign) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being tracked */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total visits across all ads in the campaign */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total engagement duration across all ads in the campaign */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total performance score across all ads */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average performance score per advertisement */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the campaign */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend (ROAS) for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertisement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the advertisement type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image for the ad type */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video for the ad type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., out of 5) */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Suggestion provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES advertisements ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisement_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target audience entry */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement targeting this group */,
  "target_group" TEXT /* Target audience description (e.g., age group, interests) */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic details related to the target audience */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the target audience */,
  "behaviors" TEXT /* Behaviors of the target audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisement_targets_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES advertisements ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertising_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign linked to this budget */,
  "allocated_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "spent_budget" REAL /* Total budget spent on the campaign to date */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget available for the campaign */,
  "budget_type" TEXT /* Type of budget (e.g., daily, total) */,
  "budget_status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., active, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertising_budgets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_timeline" (
  "timeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event in the timeline */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign related to this event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., launch, completion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_timeline_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "advertiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertiser */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry category of the advertiser */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the advertiser */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the advertiser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertiser_campaigns" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id", "campaign_id")
)
